phrases.telugu: ఒక దయగల మాట, చాలా దూరం వెళ్తుంది.
phrases.transliteration: oka dayagala maaTa, chaalaa dooram veLtundi.

phrases.english: Every day is a new chance.
Learn Telugu, speak Telugu, live Telugu.
phrases.telugu: తెలుగు నేర్చుకోండి, తెలుగు మాట్లాడండి, తెలుగు జీవించండి.
phrases.transliteration: telugu nerchukondi, telugu matladandi, telugu jeevinchandi.

phrases.english: Every word, a new step forward.
Don't fear mistakes, learn from them.
Patience and practice, that's the key.
Explore your mind, build your world.
phrases.telugu: నీ మనసును అన్వేషించు, నీ ప్రపంచాన్ని నిర్మించు.
phrases.transliteration: nee manasunu anveshinchu, nee prapanchanni nirmించు.

phrases.english: Let thoughts flow, make something happen.
Hello friend, good to see you.
Slow and steady, wins the race.
Good things take time, wait for it.
phrases.telugu: మంచి పనులకు సమయం పడుతుంది, ఓపిక పట్టండి.
phrases.transliteration: Manchi panulaku samayam padutundi, opika pattandi.

phrases.english: Rome wasn't built in a day.
Try new things, expand your mind.
This is such a happy day!
My heart is full of joy.
Believe in yourself, you can do it.
Push a little harder, you're close.
phrases.telugu: ఇంకాస్త గట్టిగా తోయు, నువ్వు దగ్గరలో ఉన్నావు.
phrases.transliteration: Inkāsta gaṭṭigā tōyu, nuvvu daggaralō unnāvu.

phrases.english: Grow through, what you go through.
Every day is a chance, to grow.
You are stronger than you think.
A little hope goes a long way.
Try again, you can do it.
Be patient, learn step by step.
Each day, a little more Telugu.
You can do this, keep going.
Patience is a virtue, be patient.
It will happen, when it's time.
Feeling a deep sense of peace.
Patience is a virtue, my friend.
Every detail matters, every step counts.
phrases.telugu: ప్రతి వివరమూ ముఖ్యం, ప్రతి అడుగూ లెక్క.
phrases.transliteration: prati vivaramu mukhyam, prati adugu lekka.

phrases.english: Dare to dream, dare to do.
phrases.telugu: కలలు కనడానికి ధైర్యం చెయ్యి, చేయడానికి ధైర్యం చెయ్యి.
phrases.transliteration: kalalu kanadaaniki dhairyam cheyyi, cheyadaaniki dhairyam cheyyi.

phrases.english: I miss you, my dear friend.
I will take this., thank you.
This is too expensive., for me.
Can you wrap?, this as a gift?
I am just looking., thank you.
This is our family, always together.
phrases.telugu: ఇది మా కుటుంబం, ఎప్పుడూ కలిసే ఉంటుంది.
phrases.transliteration: idi maa kutumbam, eppudu kalise untundi.

phrases.english: I want to buy this, quickly.
Can I have, a table for two?
